hero.headline: Four decades of fertility excellence — built on hope
hero.paragraph: Since 1984, Bavishi Fertility Institute has helped over 30,000 families experience the joy of parenthood — pioneering IVF in India and growing into one of the country's most trusted fertility networks, with 15 centres across 8 cities.

milestones.d: Dr. Himanshu & Dr. Falguni Bavishi found Bavishi Fertility Institute in Ahmedabad with one promise — fertility care above international standards, with an Indian heart.
Bavishi Fertility Institute helps bring modern IVF and assisted reproduction to thousands of Indian families.
India's first live birth from a vitrified (frozen) egg, and India's first surrogacy for an international couple — milestones that shaped Indian reproductive medicine.
Honoured for excellence in IVF & fertility care for five consecutive years — a record of consistency, not chance.
30,000+ successful pregnancies, 3,000+ IVF cycles every year, and Class 1000 embryology labs across 8 Indian cities.

trustPillars.d: Since 1984, a family-led institute that pioneered IVF in India and has guided 30,000+ families to parenthood.
3,000+ IVF cycles a year with a focus on safe stimulation, best-quality embryos and healthy single pregnancies.
Reproductive endocrinologists, embryologists, andrologists, fetal-medicine experts, counsellors and nutritionists under one roof.
Class 1000 IVF labs — 10× cleaner than the international standard — with time-lapse imaging, vitrification and PGT.
Honest counselling, no hidden costs, double-witnessing of every sample, and the Suraksha Kavach assurance.
Our four values shape every plan — personalised, compassionate and judicious use of advanced reproductive technology.

network.subtitle: World-class fertility care, close to home — wherever you are.

seo.metaTitle: About Bavishi Fertility Institute — 40 Years of IVF Excellence in India
seo.metaDescription: Founded in 1984 by Dr. Himanshu & Dr. Falguni Bavishi, Bavishi Fertility Institute has guided 30,000+ families to parenthood across 15 centres. Discover our story, legacy and values.
seo.ogTitle: About Bavishi Fertility Institute — India's Trusted IVF Legacy Since 1984
seo.ogDescription: 30,000+ pregnancies. 15 centres across 8 cities. National Fertility Award 5 years running. The story of India's pioneering fertility institute.
